properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I consider The works of your fingers The sun and the stars The land and the sea I start to wonder Almighty Creator Just why you would ever Take thought of me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Yet you have called me by name You are acquainted with all my ways Bought by your blood, drawn by your love, I am your dwelling place.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For you have called me your friend Showing me favour again and again I’m set apart close to your side You called me by name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: All of creation was made for your pleasure The sun and the stars, the land and the sea But by your grace, you have given me favour With you I will dwell for eternity.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Bought by your blood Drawn by your love I am your dwelling place.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I am set apart Close to your side You called me by name.
